title: Nicipe pullata
taxonomy: Nicipe pullata is classified as a species of moth in the family Pterophoridae, commonly known as plume moths. The Pterophoridae family is part of the order Lepidoptera, which includes butterflies and moths. This family is characterized by the presence of plume-like scales on the hindwings, from which they get their common name. Further classification of Nicipe pullata places it in the subfamily Pterophorinae. The classification of Nicipe pullata helps in understanding its evolutionary relationships with other species within the Lepidoptera order.
